_meta: Scene blueprint — read by animation_engine.py and frame_generator.py

dialogue.line: And THAT is why everyone at the gym is talking about XPEL. Link in bio.

frame.MrWilly_pose: facing camera directly, big confident smile, one arm raised holding Xpel box up toward camera, other hand doing thumbs up or finger guns
frame.MrWilly_expression: triumphant, warm, direct address to viewer, maximum energy
frame.Xpel_pose: being held up by MrWilly, facing camera, big happy smile, tiny arms waving at camera
frame.Xpel_expression: thrilled to be held up, celebrating, waving happily
frame.camera_angle: medium close-up, slight low angle looking up — hero shot

camera_motion.movement: slow push in to create hero moment, slight upward tilt

character_motion.MrWilly: natural confident breathing, slight proud chest expansion, arm holding Xpel remains steady and raised, head nods once
character_motion.Xpel: tiny arms wave happily at camera, slight wiggle with excitement — no spinning, no particles
